synopsis: Over the bodies of their enemies, two Jedi make a pact that will set them on the path to a greater danger than they have ever known… Bounty hunters capture a prisoner whose presence will test their resolve—and the strength of their alliance… A Sith apprentice is given the honorific "Darth" and sent to hunt a quarry whose capture—or death—could shake an empire to its foundations… And a Princess finds herself alone in the galaxy, pursued by those she once counted as allies. This is only the second issue of the new ongoing series Star Wars: Legacy and alread
title: Legacy #02: Broken, Part 2
